aperture_relation.interpretation: the six-edge eta6 aperture is not itself the 60/90 graph; the truncated-icosahedral skeleton lives at the dual public-boundary lift

construction.dual_surface: dual icosahedral surface: 12 vertices, 30 edges, 20 triangular d20-state faces
construction.public_boundary: certified d20 dodecahedral graph: 20 vertices, 30 edges, 12 pentagonal faces
construction.truncation: replace each directed dual edge by one vertex; add original-edge links and cyclic links around each dual vertex
